content_body: My wife and I - along with our great niece and a friend - had a very enjoyable and memorable week here in Hiwassee River Sanctuary. Found some unexpected treasures, so local "off-the-radar" get-aways and took in some area attractions. I went to school in the Great Smokey Mtns. This trip reminded me just how much, and why, I love the mountains. We've gone on vacation the past few years to the beach - everyone's default location - so I wasn't sure how this would go... Especially with two youngsters along. This has been one of our best weeks off in a very long time. Lots of good times and good memories. ~The Fultons
title: A Memorable Week
